title: 有馬記念の後に・最高の手ごたえ

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: How does it feel to run in such a famous race?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Running with that great group of talented
athletes was such a blast!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
choice_data_list: That was the most fun I've seen you have.
That was the most fun I've seen you have.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
choice_data_list: That was the most fun I've seen you have.
That was the most fun I've seen you have.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! It's partly because I ran with so many
great racers...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But mostly, I felt like I really succeeded at making
everyone want to go after me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I do believe I'm going to enjoy running next
year—or rather, next year and all the years after!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Now that this year's final race is over, it's time for the final drive!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's hit the road and finish the year off right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen comes to a close for Maruzensky
after a very satisfying race.
